posts.title: As we remember those who gave their all for our freedom today, let us, also, remember the first who sacrificed His life for all.  Thank you Jesus, thank you US soldiers and God bless the families of the fallen.  Have a blessed Memorial Day.

posts.author: Agent_86
posts.title:
My family has fought in every war this country has had, from the Revolutionary War up to the Iraq War. I wanted to say thank you to them, and to all of those who gave their lives for our country.
God bless my family and theirs.
THANK YOU.
